name: github
description: Inspect repositories, issues, pull requests, and GitHub metadata through a GitHub MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect repositories, issues, and pull requests.
interface.longDescription: Inspect repositories, issues, pull requests, and GitHub metadata through a GitHub MCP server.

mcpServers.name: GitHub
permissions: Uses GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN as a process environment variable
Can expose repository, issue, and pull request tools

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.title: Read File
tools.description: Read file contents from a repository.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.title: Create Issue
tools.description: Create an issue in a repository.

configFields.label: GitHub token
configFields.description: A personal access token with the repository scopes needed for the tools you enable.

installReview: The token is passed only to the external MCP process as GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.
Write actions still require runtime tool permission approval.

skillPreviews.name: gh-address-comments
skillPreviews.description: Address actionable GitHub pull request review feedback. Use when the user wants to inspect unresolved review threads, requested changes, or inline review comments on a PR, then implement selected fixes. Use the GitHub app for PR metadata and flat comment reads, and use the bundled GraphQL script via `gh` whenever thread-level state, resolution status, or inline review context matters.

skillPreviews.name: gh-fix-ci
skillPreviews.description: Use when a user asks to debug or fix failing GitHub PR checks that run in GitHub Actions. Use the GitHub app from this plugin for PR metadata and patch context, and use `gh` for Actions check and log inspection before implementing any approved fix.

skillPreviews.name: github
skillPreviews.description: Triage and orient GitHub repository, pull request, and issue work through the connected GitHub app. Use when the user asks for general GitHub help, wants PR or issue summaries, or needs repository context before choosing a more specific GitHub workflow.

skillPreviews.name: yeet
skillPreviews.description: Publish local changes to GitHub by confirming scope, committing intentionally, pushing the branch, and opening a draft PR through the GitHub app from this plugin, with `gh` used only as a fallback where connector coverage is insufficient.
